title: distichlis spicata var. marginata
intro: Distichlis spicata var. marginata, also known as saltwort or coastal saltwort, is a type of halophytic shrub that belongs to the Amaranthaceae family. It is native to coastal areas and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Distichlis spicata var. marginata include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing antioxidant activity. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or salves to utilize its medicinal properties.
